description: Audited deployments of agentpay-base contracts on EVM chains. Each entry binds a network and a contract address to a runtime-bytecode keccak256 hash. The SDK refuses mainnet writes whose deployed bytecode does not appear here with `mainnetAllowed: true`. Entries are appended only after an external auditor signs the corresponding source + deployment.
hash_algorithm: keccak256(runtime bytecode at the deployment address, fetched via eth_getCode)
